<content>1: //! Markdown to `ProseMirror` JSON conversion.
2: //!
3: //! Converts `CommonMark` markdown to `ProseMirror` JSON format and vice versa.
4: //! Uses `comrak` for parsing and serialization.
5: //!
6: //! # `ProseMirror` Schema
7: //!
8: //! This module generates JSON compatible with the `prosemirror-markdown` schema:
9: //!
10: //! ## Nodes
11: //! - `doc`: Root document containing blocks
12: //! - `paragraph`: Block containing inline content
13: //! - `heading`: Heading with `level` attribute (1-6)
14: //! - `blockquote`: Block quote containing blocks
15: //! - `code_block`: Code block with optional `params` attribute
16: //! - `horizontal_rule`: Thematic break
17: //! - `bullet_list`: Unordered list with `tight` attribute
18: //! - `ordered_list`: Ordered list with `order` and `tight` attributes
19: //! - `list_item`: List item containing blocks
20: //! - `image`: Inline image with `src`, `alt`, `title` attributes
21: //! - `hard_break`: Hard line break
22: //! - `text`: Text content
23: //!
24: //! ## Marks
25: //! - `em`: Emphasis (italic)
26: //! - `strong`: Strong emphasis (bold)
27: //! - `code`: Inline code
28: //! - `link`: Hyperlink with `href` and `title` attributes
29: 
30: use comrak::nodes::{AstNode, ListType, NodeValue};
31: use comrak::{Arena, Options, format_commonmark, parse_document};
32: use serde_json::{Value, json};
33: 
34: /// Error type for markdown conversion.
35: #[derive(Debug)]
36: pub enum ConversionError {
37:     /// The JSON structure is missing a required `type` field.
38:     MissingType,
39:     /// The JSON contains an unknown node type.
40:     UnknownType(String),
41:     /// Failed to format markdown output.
42:     FormatError(std::fmt::Error),
43: }
44: 
45: impl std::fmt::Display for ConversionError {
46:     fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
47:         match self {
48:             Self::MissingType => write!(f, "JSON node missing 'type' field"),
49:             Self::UnknownType(t) => write!(f, "Unknown node type: {t}"),
50:             Self::FormatError(e) => write!(f, "Markdown format error: {e}"),
